_comment: Single source of truth for all MCP server definitions. Run scripts/install-mcps.sh to sync this into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and VS Code.
_phase: Phase 6 complete — all 20 servers active (9 standard + 11 custom)

linear.description: Linear issue management — create/update issues, search projects, manage roadmap

github.description: GitHub — search code, create branches and PRs, review PRs, manage releases

sentry.description: Sentry — error lookup, release monitoring, stack trace analysis (read-only)

context7.description: Context7 — framework and dependency documentation, best practices lookup (public, no key required)

playwright.description: Playwright — E2E test execution, UI validation, screenshot capture

neon.description: Neon PostgreSQL — schema inspection, query analysis, migration review (read-only by default)

mongodb.description: MongoDB — collection inspection, query review, document analysis (read-only by default)

railway.description: Railway — deployment inspection, preview environment control, log access (no production deploy)

figma.description: Figma — read designs, export specs, generate component stubs (read-only)

factory-clerk.description: Clerk — user lookup, session inspection, auth configuration review (read-only; no user mutation)

factory-idme.description: id.me — identity verification workflow inspection (no production modifications)

factory-meilisearch.description: Meilisearch — index inspection, search testing, sandbox index writes

factory-snyk.description: Snyk — dependency scanning, container scanning (scan-only; no policy changes)

factory-semgrep.description: Semgrep — SAST security rule execution, findings retrieval

factory-sonarqube.description: SonarQube — code quality reports, technical debt metrics (read-only)

factory-resend.description: Resend — email template review, sandbox test email sending (sandbox only; no production sends)

factory-r2.description: Cloudflare R2 — object inspection, bucket review (no production deletes)

factory-railway.description: Railway custom wrapper — deployment inspection, preview environment control (no production deployment)

factory-magic21.description: Magic21 — API execution, AI tooling, UI/UX generation tooling

factory-knowledge.description: Knowledge base — semantic search over ADRs, threat models, runbooks, and policies via ChromaDB + nomic-embed-text
